articles.author: Yuri Kageyama
articles.title: Asian shares decline as oil prices soar amid the war in Iran, echoing last week's Wall Street drop - AP News
articles.description: Asian shares are mostly declining, as worries continue about soaring oil prices and the potential for further escalation in the U.S. war with Iran. But shares rose moderately in early Monday trading in France, Germany and Britain. U.S. futures also rose. Benc…
articles.content: TOKYO (AP) Asian shares mostly dipped Monday, as worries continued about soaring oil prices and the potential for further escalation in the U.S. war with Iran, but shares rose moderately in Europe in… [+2363 chars]
